result_summary.description: Stylized seal script character with a curved top hook and an enclosed trapezoidal shape below, resembling 日 or 旦 in ancient seal form

Abstract black and white fragment showing dark, possibly organic textured material (resembling feathers, fur, or rough surface) crossed by white streaks or scratches. Appears to be a cropped portion of a larger image rather than a discrete glyph or symbol.
Fragmented black and white shapes that appear to be a partial crop of a larger image, possibly showing curved letterforms or design elements, but no clear identifiable glyph or character is visible.
A single short white diagonal stroke on a black background, slanting from lower-left to upper-right
